text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Ahh, how delightful!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I never thought I'd get to compete against you in
the winter Grand Prix, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, delightful indeed! Truly! I can't help but sing!
Lu lu laaa ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's never a day you stop being annoying, is
there?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, uh... I-I'm, well... I'm happy too!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But I'm also... j-just as ready to win! S-so you
b-better watch out!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... d-don't want to lose! Not to you, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm Narita Top Road! I'll try my best to win your
support!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, Top Road! It's Top Roooad!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan B
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Aw! I'm so glad you're running in the Arima Kinen! I know you can do it!
